sub_modules.aes_sbox: Combinational AES S-box lookup table used by SubBytes and key expansion SubWord step.
sub_modules.aes_mixcolumns: Combinational GF(2^8) MixColumns transform applied to a single 32-bit state column.
sub_modules.aes_round: Combinational single AES round: SubBytes, ShiftRows, MixColumns (skipped on final round), and AddRoundKey.
sub_modules.aes_key_expand_round: Combinational AES-128 key schedule round: RotWord, SubWord, Rcon XOR, and word chaining to produce next round key.
